createTable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS paths (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, destiny TEXT NOT NULL, callback TEXT, method_destiny TEXT NOT NULL, method_callback TEXT, content_type_destiny TEXT, content_type_callback TEXT, headers_destiny TEXT, headers_callback TEXT, enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, is_async INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL)
alterAddCallback: ALTER TABLE paths ADD COLUMN callback TEXT
alterAddMethodCallback: ALTER TABLE paths ADD COLUMN method_callback TEXT
alterAddContentTypeDestiny: ALTER TABLE paths ADD COLUMN content_type_destiny TEXT
alterAddContentTypeCallback: ALTER TABLE paths ADD COLUMN content_type_callback TEXT
alterAddHeadersDestiny: ALTER TABLE paths ADD COLUMN headers_destiny TEXT
alterAddHeadersCallback: ALTER TABLE paths ADD COLUMN headers_callback TEXT
alterAddIsAsync: ALTER TABLE paths ADD COLUMN is_async INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
selectAll: SELECT id, path, destiny, callback, method_destiny, method_callback, content_type_destiny, content_type_callback, headers_destiny, headers_callback, enabled, is_async, created_at, updated_at FROM paths ORDER BY path ASC
selectByPath: SELECT id, path, destiny, callback, method_destiny, method_callback, content_type_destiny, content_type_callback, headers_destiny, headers_callback, enabled, is_async, created_at, updated_at FROM paths WHERE path = ? AND enabled = 1 LIMIT 1
insert: INSERT INTO paths (id, path, destiny, callback, method_destiny, method_callback, content_type_destiny, content_type_callback, headers_destiny, headers_callback, enabled, is_async, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
update: UPDATE paths SET path = ?, destiny = ?, callback = ?, method_destiny = ?, method_callback = ?, content_type_destiny = ?, content_type_callback = ?, headers_destiny = ?, headers_callback = ?, enabled = ?, is_async = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?
